title: Dalmia Bharat is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Dalmia Bharat is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Dalmia Bharat are looking for an experienced Quality Control Engineer based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dalmia Bharat:
Dalmia Bharat is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dalmia Bharat!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
